request.prompt: Create a polished anime-style chibi OGP card for a shareable X post. Character identity: 名探偵 (TFLP). This must be the exact same character as the reference chibi, not a redesign. Preserve the same face, hairstyle, outfit, props, and core color palette as the reference chibi. Keep the result cute and chibi-proportioned, but not static, idle, or sticker-like. The generated image itself must include the title typography as part of the final design. Render the exact Japanese title text "名探偵". Render the exact type code text "TFLP". Keep the spelling, casing, and character order exact. Do not translate, paraphrase, or replace the requested text. Do not translate the Japanese title into English or any other language. The only Latin letters allowed in the image are the exact type code characters. Place the title and type code as integrated editorial typography on the right side of the composition. The typography should feel designed into the image, not pasted on afterward. Gender presentation: male. Age impression: 20代後半. Archetype: 冷静なリードインベスティゲーター. Character notes: 鋭い観察眼を持つ知的な青年。落ち着いた声で卓を仕切り、決定打になる事実を静かに積み上げていく。. Outfit and props: ネイビーのスリーピーススーツにえんじ色のネクタイ、白いシャツ、革の手帳と銀のペン。上品で無駄のない探偵風の装い。. Core palette: navy, burgundy, gold. Expression: 冷静で自信のある視線. Base pose cue from the type data: 片手に手帳を持ち、もう片手で論点を示す. Supporting visual hints: Character illustration for a murder mystery personality result card. One Japanese male character in his late 20s, calm master detective archetype, intelligent face, dark brown neatly side-parted hair, sharp eyes. Navy three-piece suit, burgundy tie, white shirt, leather notebook and silver pen. Waist-up composition, elegant mysterious indoor lighting, muted gray background with gold accents, cinematic, highly detailed, no logo マーダーミステリー診断の結果カード用イラスト。日本人男性キャラクター1人, 20代後半, 冷静な名探偵タイプ, 知的で端正な顔立ち, ダークブラウンの清潔感のある7:3ヘアスタイル, 鋭い視線。ネイビーのスリーピーススーツ, えんじ色のネクタイ, 白いシャツ, 革の手帳と銀のペン。上半身構図, 上品でミステリアスな室内光, 落ち着いた灰色背景に金のアクセント, シネマティック, 精密描写, ロゴなし. Pose direction (reaction-side): Create a fast sideways reaction with weight shift, asymmetrical shoulders, and a sharp side gaze or hand movement. Favor a side-heavy composition with visible directional flow. Compose exactly one character, large in frame, with a strong diagonal silhouette. Make the pose extremely bold, asymmetrical, and mid-action. Ensure either the torso twist, limb action, or gaze direction clearly suggests motion. Prefer a composition that feels surprising and physically dynamic rather than neat or centered. An unusual camera angle is welcome if readability stays strong. Use a restrained atmospheric background with minimal clutter and clean value separation. Keep the integrated title and type code highly readable at social-card size. Keep the bottom-right corner visually simple and blank. Do not place any text there. Do not add any text other than the exact requested title and type code. Do not add logo, watermark, extra characters, or a plain upright pose. Avoid: multiple characters, childish proportions, overly comedic expression, excessive skin exposure, overly casual modern outfit, low resolution, blurry, logo, watermark, extra props, deformed hands, 複数人, 子供っぽい体型, コミカルすぎる表情, 過度な露出, 現代カジュアルすぎる服装, 低解像度, ぼやけ, ロゴ, 透かし, 余計な小物, 手の崩れ, static standing pose, symmetrical pose, tiny character, unreadable silhouette, redesigned outfit, missing props, cluttered background, extra text beyond the exact requested title and type code, translated title, english headline, subtitle, brand label, caption, wrong spelling in the requested title or type code.
